events.label: reasoning
events.text:
The scenario describes a hazardous condition: venting trapped pressure to face level during manifold operations in I&C scope. This is a safety hazard. Work is in-progress. Need to fail. Need to state what must happen before work can continue: stop work, isolate/depressurize safely, correct venting arrangement per mfr procedures, etc.
